org.bouncycastle.x509.extension

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.bouncycastle.x509.extension.X509ExtensionUtil
  • Deprecated. 
    use org.bouncycastle.cert.jcajce.JcaX509ExtensionUtils

    public class X509ExtensionUtil
extends java.lang.Object
